summary: FCI Annexure-1 Verification Report (v104.19.0) - All tests PASSED. Backend: 15/15 API tests passed. Frontend: Annexure-1 layout renders correctly with all required elements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FCI Annexure-1 Verification Report feature fully tested. Key verifications: (1) GET /api/govt-registers/verification-report/full returns correct structure with agencies[], rice_cols[], paddy I-VI, rice VII-XIV. (2) PDF export works (16+ KB, valid %PDF-1.4). (3) Settings persistence for electricity_kw, electricity_kv, milling_capacity_mt, variety via /api/settings/verification-meter. (4) Milling register bug fix verified: FCI delivery shows in FCI column (290 Qtl), RRC=0. (5) Frontend Annexure-1 layout renders with title, miller details, meter readings, paddy table with 5 agencies, rice table with RRC/FCI/RRC_FRK/FCI_FRK columns. (6) Paddy Release form has Agency dropdown with data-testid='paddy-release-agency' and 5 options.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/govt-registers/milling-register - FCI delivery column bug fix - PASS
